name: Middo Fully Automated Stack
onCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mariadb-server
postStartCommand: sudo rm -f /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock && sudo /usr/local/bin/docker-php-ext-install mysqli pdo_mysql && echo "extension=$(sudo find /usr/local/lib/php/extensions/ -name 'pdo_mysql.so' | head -n 1)" | sudo tee /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/docker-php-ext-pdo_mysql.ini && echo "extension=$(sudo find /usr/local/lib/php/extensions/ -name 'mysqli.so' | head -n 1)" | sudo tee /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/docker-php-ext-mysqli.ini && sudo mkdir -p /var/run/mysqld && sudo chown -R mysql:mysql /var/run/mysqld /var/lib/mysql && sudo /usr/sbin/mysqld --user=mysql --bind-address=0.0.0.0 & sleep 4 && /usr/local/bin/php -S 0.0.0.0:8080 -t /var/www/phpmyadmin & cd /workspaces/middo && /usr/local/bin/php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000 &
